skipped_layers.reason: Spec defines this eval as a reproducible repository contract-smoke record; shell contract tests and fixed prompt judgments are the required harness boundary.
No external model transcripts were generated; checked-in markdown artifact is the review surface.

runs.summary: Old contract passed while asserting legacy skill_related routing semantics.
New v4 contract passed with skill_workflow and hash/SHA review evidence assertions.

runs.prompt: A Beads issue asks to update skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md trigger/routing behavior and add eval evidence. Decide quick_edit, execution_lane, and skill_workflow.
A Beads issue asks to fix a typo in README.md with no behavior, contract, or cross-repo impact. Decide quick_edit, execution_lane, and skill_workflow.

with_skill.summary: Changed v4 contract test and fixed prompt judgments passed with skill_workflow/hash-SHA guidance.

without_skill.summary: Baseline old contract test passed but asserted legacy skill_related routing; baseline prompt behavior lacked v4 target fields.

delta.summary: Active guidance moved from skill_related routing semantics to v4 skill_workflow plus content-hash/reviewed-at-SHA evidence.

run_summary.conclusion: v4 vocabulary replaced active skill_related routing semantics and the focused contract test passes.
